title: 100PCS Emoji Latex Balloons, Emotion Smiley Face Balloon for Kids, 12 in Party Funny Balloons with 2 Ribbons for Girl Boy Birthday Party Decor Supplies
features: 【Contents List】You will receive 100pcs 12 in emoji latex balloons with more than 10 different colours and emojis, shipped randomly.There are also two rolls of balloon ribbon. Just received the balloons will have latex smell, we recommend ventilating before use or use an inflator.

【Thickened Material】Our smiley balloons are made of high quality natural latex, smiley balloons with vivid patterns, anti-pressure wear-resistant, no harmful substances, you can rest assured that you can use.

【Practicality】This balloon is easy to inflate, reusable, deflate when not in use, and store the balloon in a dry place for next use. Different combinations of coloured balloons can add more colours to your party!

【Wide Application】This boys birthday balloon is ideal party supplies and decorations for happy weddings, birthday parties, graduations, back-to-school, and other parties to add a romantic atmosphere, spreading good moods, good vibes, and adding fun!
【Gentle Reminder】Please do not over-inflate the birthday girl balloon and avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction.
description: Product description 100PCS Emoji Birthday Balloons, Latex Balloons for Kids, Emotion Baloons, Party Funny Balloons, 12 Inch Balloon with 2 Ribbons for Girl Boy Birthday Wedding Ceremony Holiday Party Functions:Our balloons are suitable for various occasions such as weddings, baby welcome parties, birthday parties, corporate events, engagement parties, table decorations and balloon bouquets.
